evidence.scientific_clarity: Three-method loss curves with CI bands on log scale match brief exactly; gap annotation at step 49 highlights OursModel advantage.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set globally; Arial/Helvetica-first font stack avoids DejaVu Sans default; label sizes 8–10 pt consistent.
evidence.palette: Explicit Okabe-Ito palette (grey/amber/blue); no green/red; directional blue accent for OursModel — fully colorblind-safe.
evidence.layout_density: 6×4 in tight_layout; log scale spans full y-range; no gaping whitespace or label collision; right/top spines removed.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption supplies exact numerics matching the annotation; legend inside upper right; CI explanation and seed count provided.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdf.fonttype=42 declared in rcParams; script runs pdffonts at save time and aborts on Type-3 detection; SVG uses fonttype=none.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial; figure.svg also generated as bonus.
evidence.caption_quality: Bold lead sentence states final-step values (0.839, 0.994, 1.189) and both gaps (−0.155, −0.350); CI definition, log scale, and n=5 seeds all documented.

overall_strengths: Colorblind-safe Okabe-Ito palette with no green/red ambiguity and clear blue accent for the proposed method.
Robust vector font pipeline: pdf.fonttype=42 in rcParams plus runtime pdffonts verification prevents Type-3 bitmap fonts.
overall_weaknesses: Gap annotation at final step only marks the distance to Method-A; the larger gap to Baseline is stated in the caption but not visually annotated in the figure.
DejaVu Sans appears as third fallback in the font stack — while Arial/Helvetica are preferred, environments missing those fonts would silently fall back to the non-preferred default.
